title: Astro Code Sprint
description: A timed competitive programming challenge. Solve increasingly difficult algorithmic missions under pressure.

title: Bot Wars
description: Build and battle autonomous bots in a one-on-one arena. May the best engineer win.

title: Orbit Design Challenge
description: Design a futuristic UI/UX for a space mission dashboard. Judged on usability, aesthetics, and innovation.

title: Telemetry Data Hackathon
description: Analyze real satellite telemetry datasets to predict anomalies and optimize orbital trajectories.

title: Launch Pad Quiz
description: A rapid-fire tech and science quiz. Categories include space history, computing, electronics, and math.

title: Signal Hunt (Hardware)
description: Identify, build, and debug electronic circuits within a countdown. Components provided on-site.
